task_completion.description: Verify that a Daily chart for SPY is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a chart window with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1D') in the title bar, tab, or chart background.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Fibonacci Retracement tool is applied or its properties window is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Fibonacci Retracement drawing on the chart or a 'Properties' dialog box specifically for the Fibonacci Retracement tool.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 78.6% (0.786) level has been added to the Fibonacci tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '78.6' or '0.786' in the list of active levels in the properties dialog, or visible as a drawn line on the chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 23.6% (0.236) level has been removed from the Fibonacci tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the properties dialog or the chart drawing and ensure that the '23.6' or '0.236' level is unchecked, deleted, or no longer visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 61.8% (0.618) level is set to the color Red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the color setting next to the '61.8' or '0.618' level in the properties dialog showing 'Red' (or a red color swatch), or the corresponding line on the chart being distinctly red.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace was saved to persist the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the agent interacting with the 'Workspaces' menu (e.g., clicking 'Save' or 'Save As') or a save confirmation dialog in NinjaTrader.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with the NinjaTrader 8 application windows, menus, and dialogs, not a terminal or command prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the workspace XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like Notepad, VSCode) open showing XML configuration files for NinjaTrader.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual trading platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the NinjaTrader 8 desktop application, not a web browser searching for how to do the task or a mock-up image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target instrument is SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). The required Fibonacci levels are standard technical analysis values: add 78.6% (0.786), remove 23.6% (0.236), and change the color of 61.8% (0.618) to Red. The workspace should be saved in NinjaTrader 8, typically located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
